title: crataegus prunifolia var. ovalifolia
intro: Crataegus prunifolia var. ovalifolia, also known as hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and cardiovascular benefits. The health benefits associated with hawthorn include reduced blood pressure, improved heart health, and enhanced antioxidant defenses, making it a popular herbal remedy for cardiovascular issues. Hawthorn is typically prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to support cardiovascular health and well-being.
